steps.assistant_text: Ring-buffer recorder, 94.4% documented CAP -> exact. (1) NO-LOCALS FULL-EXPRESSION FORM (the breakthrough): delete cur/prev/idx locals, spell every access *(int*)((char*)a0 + a0[0x7C/4]*4 + OFF) — kills the phi move v1,a3 (both address defs share one expression-web home) and the 0xBC store invalidates the VN so the reload/readdress happens NATURALLY; if-body then starts at an unstealable sw -> as1 rule-3 beql + dup'd shared sw in the annulled delay. (2) Name ONLY diff (int diff = cur - prev) -> colors a3 while CSE'd prevbc stays scratch t0. (3) Array-IXA prev access a0[((a0[0x7C/4]-1)&3) + 0x2F] flips the last addu base-first (the (char*)&a0[idx]+0xBC hybrid does NOT flip it; only pure index form). Retracts the 'phi-move vs beql debris tension' cap entry.
